user.title: Well Level Bridge
user.description: Configure the TCP serial bridge and filtering behavior. Leave connection disabled until Node-RED is no longer connected to the serial bridge.

data_description.connect_on_start: Disable this while Node-RED is still using the TCP bridge. The bridge accepts only one TCP client.
data_description.update_interval: Rate limit for filtered sensor updates. The existing Node-RED flow uses 5 seconds.
data_description.window_size: Moving average window. The existing Node-RED flow uses 200 samples.
data_description.derivative_threshold: Filtered values are rejected when the delta from the last accepted filtered value is larger than this many feet.

error.invalid_range: Minimum accepted value must be lower than maximum accepted value.

init.title: Well Level Bridge Options
init.description: Update TCP and filtering settings. Changing options reloads the integration.
